config.enable-debug.tooltip: Enable detailed debug logging. Disable for cleaner console output.
config.hopper-capacity.tooltip: Maximum number of filter items the hopper can hold (must be a multiple of 12)
config.compare-quality.tooltip: If enabled, filters will check item quality as well as item ID
config.compare-artifact-source.tooltip: If enabled, filters will check the source of artisan goods (e.g., starfruit wine vs ancient fruit wine). Disable to transfer all variants of the same preserve type.
config.transfer-interval.tooltip: How often the item transfer logic runs in frames (1 = every frame, 60 = every second)
config.grab-automate-chest-group.tooltip: Grab all chests in Automate Group if the input chest is part of one (requires Automate mod)
config.flooring-as-input.tooltip: Allow flooring (paths) to act as the hopper's input connector, linking to connected chests. Only takes effect when 'Connect Automate Chest Group' is enabled. When disabled, only chests directly above the hopper are recognized as input.
